content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "baseline"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 7077
    name: spark
  - port: 8080
    name: webui
  selector:
    app: spark-master
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-master
        component: master
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-master
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7077
          name: spark
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: webui
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-worker
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-worker
        component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-worker
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        env:
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
          value: "1G"
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
          value: "1"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "broadcast"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "aqe"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

input.command:
# Decode and examine the baseline script
echo "" | base64 -d

content.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

2. Measure the skew ratio
3. Run the join query

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  status=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$i] status=$status"
  if [ "$status" = "Complete" ] || [ "$status" = "Failed" ]; then
    echo "Job finished with: $status"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done

content.text: The baseline job completed successfully, showing a **skew_ratio of 44x** and elapsed time of **32.99s**. Now I'll apply both optimization jobs.

input.description: Apply broadcast and AQE optimization jobs

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  bcast=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  aqe=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$i] broadcast=$bcast  aqe=$aqe"
  if [ "$bcast" = "Complete" ] || [ "$bcast" = "Failed" ]; then
    if [ "$aqe" = "Complete" ] || [ "$aqe" = "Failed" ]; then
      echo "Both jobs finished."
      break
    fi
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll both optimization jobs until completion

description: Poll both optimization jobs until completion
